steps.title: Apply the inequalities with y = 53
steps.content:
The point $(x, 53)$ has $y = 53$. The first inequality $y > 14$ is satisfied since $53 > 14$. ✓

For the second inequality $4x + y < 18$, substitute $y = 53$:
$$4x + 53 < 18$$
$$4x < -35$$
$$x < -8.75$$

steps.title: Determine which choice satisfies the constraint x < -8.75
steps.content:
Testing each choice:
  • A: $-9 < -8.75$ ✓
  • B: $-5 < -8.75$ ✗
  • C: $5 < -8.75$ ✗
  • D: $9 < -8.75$ ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
